data.body: Child tickets delivered + parented (parent_id=e0e2-7205-48cc-4480): blunt-tramp-kale (1c66-6644-4dfb-4afa, Cluster 1) and snag-reek-ember (325a-8036-2069-4ed4, Cluster 2) — both CLOSED with HMAC-signed completion-verifier PASS verdicts. Shipped in PR #21, merged to main. Note: parent/child is the parent_id hierarchy, NOT a deps edge, so this epic's deps[] is correctly empty; the children are discoverable via list_tickets(parent_id=...).
